{{Infobox character
| name = Riyusai Meira
| aliases = Meira
| abilities = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|scythe-blade of green flame, [[Iron body]], [[Ruler technique]], sword and blood techniques, lance of life-madra}}
| titles = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Underlady]], star Underlord of the Seishen Kingdom, [[Underlord]]}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|, Seishen Underlady}}
| affiliations = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen Kingdom]]}}
| professions = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|keeper of the Seishen royal garden}}{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|, [[life artist]]}}
| residence = {{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Seishen royal garden]]}}
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Underlord (novel)|Underlord]]
}}

''See also: [[Riyusai Meira Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Riyusai Meira, also known as Meira, is the keeper of the [[Seishen royal garden]] and holds the rank of [[Underlady]]. Recognized as a genius, she has sworn an oath to protect the [[Seishen]] royal family, specifically citing a debt of gratitude toward a ruler who raised and trained her since childhood. Her combat abilities are formidable; she utilizes a scythe that manifests life-fire and can manipulate vines through the use of [[life madra]] or [[Ruler techniques]]. Her physical constitution is reinforced by [[soulfire]], and she wears specialized armor that can appear as polished wood with a glowing green interior. Meira has demonstrated intense emotional volatility, ranging from calm and mask-like composure to extreme fury. Following the death of Kiro, she engaged in a quest for vengeance that nearly cost her her life. She has been involved in direct confrontations with [[Yerin]], attempting to kill her and later threatening widespread violence against those close to her. In her role within the [[Seishen Kingdom]], she has served as a protector and scout, though she has also faced the responsibility of receiving the surviving heir, [[Seishen Daji]], following the [[Akura clan]]'s intervention in her kingdom.}}

== Underlord ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Riyusai Meira is a gray-eyed, gray-haired [[Underlord]] of the [[Seishen Kingdom]] and the keeper of its royal garden. An exceptional talent who was reforged in [[soulfire]] to possess an [[Iron body]], she traveled with Kiro while searching for the [[Blackflame]] boy. Although her [[Path]] was not originally intended for combat, she wields a scythe of [[green flame]] and utilizes [[Ruler techniques]] to manipulate black roots. During her engagements, she has demonstrated mastery over [[sword]], blood, and [[life madra]], even launching lances of light or blooming into a tree of [[life madra]]. As an ally to Kiro and Daji, she has fought against a [[sword]] girl and her [[Blood Shadow]], at one point threatening the friends and family of [[Yerin]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">27</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is behind Kiro.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c6">''Underlord'', chapter 6</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira wields a scythe-blade of [[green flame]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9">''Underlord'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira possesses pink-flower Goldsigns in her gray hair.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira was searching for the [[Blackflame]] boy with Kiro.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10">''Underlord'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|[[Riyusai Meira]] is the keeper of the [[Seishen royal garden]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is an [[Underlady]] who uses a scythe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira has an [[Iron body]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira was reforged in [[soulfire]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira uses a [[Ruler technique]] to manipulate black roots.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is a gray-eyed and gray-haired woman with the spirit of an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11">''Underlord'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira uses a scythe.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c11" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is an exceptional talent and skill user.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c13">''Underlord'', chapter 13</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is a star [[Underlord]] of the [[Seishen Kingdom]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c15">''Underlord'', chapter 15</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira can conjure [[life madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16">''Underlord'', chapter 16</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira has [[sword]] and blood techniques.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira has gray eyes.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c16" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is an [[Underlord]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c18">''Underlord'', chapter 18</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira gathers a ball of green light to launch a lance of life-[[madra]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19">''Underlord'', chapter 19</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira owes a debt to an unnamed man who trained her.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Beneath Meira's armor are green and silver [[Remnant]] parts.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira's [[Path]] was not meant for combat.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c19" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is a person [[Seishen Daji]] might have joined.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20">''Underlord'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is engaging a [[sword]] girl and her [[Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is an ally of Daji and Kiro.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira is covered in [[life madra]] that has bloomed into a tree.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c20" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira threatened to kill [[Yerin]]'s friends and family.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21">''Underlord'', chapter 21</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-06-underlord|Meira was carried in an owl.<ref name="cradle-06-underlord-c21" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Uncrowned ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">1</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-07-uncrowned|Meira is a [[Seishen]] [[Underlady]] who previously tore apart [[Yerin's Blood Shadow]].<ref name="cradle-07-uncrowned-c2">''Uncrowned'', chapter 2</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Wintersteel ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Riyusai Meira is a life artist and an [[Underlady]] whose [[Goldsign]] manifests as a pink flower positioned over one ear. While traveling on a small cloudship alongside a squad of [[Golds]] from the [[Seishen Kingdom]], she became aware of Prince Daji's presence. Clad in full armor, she was later observed looking up the stairs.}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Meira is an [[Underlady]] and a life artist.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Meira's [[Goldsign]] is a pink flower over one ear.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Meira accompanied a squad of [[Seishen Kingdom]] [[Golds]] on a small cloudship.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12">''Wintersteel'', chapter 12</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Meira can sense Prince Daji.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c12" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Meira is wearing full armor.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c20">''Wintersteel'', chapter 20</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|Meira was wearing full armor and looking up the stairs.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c26">''Wintersteel'', chapter 26</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|As an [[Underlady]], Riyusai Meira maintains a cycling garden and utilizes [[natural treasures]] of the life-aspect for her training. She serves as a messenger, repeating the words of the [[Sage]] to [[King Dakata]]. Although she interacts with the monarch, her unwavering loyalty to Prince Kiro has protected her from the King's anger. In combat, she wields a scythe featuring a blade of [[green flame]].}}

<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">6</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Riyusai Meira]] is an [[Underlady]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 9</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|[[Riyusai Meira]] uses life-aspect [[natural treasures]] for training.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Meira repeats the [[Sage]]'s messages to [[King Dakata]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Meira's loyalty to Prince Kiro shielded her from [[King Dakata]]'s wrath.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Meira possesses a cycling garden.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Meira uses a scythe with a blade of [[green flame]].<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c14">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 14</ref>}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|“Underlady Riyusai Meira,” the owl said, in the cool voice of the Sage of the Silver Heart.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c9" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Underlord]]
[[Category:Uncrowned]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Titled characters]]
[[Category:Sacred artists]]
[[Category:Viewpoint characters]]
